Name: Stone, Sky, Sea - The Windward Wilds (Extreme)
Description:
“<If(PlayerParameter(4))>She<Else/>He</If> who would allow eccentric researcher to modify durability of her striking dummies to match savagery of otherworldly monster embellished to extremes by whimsical bard is either great warrior or places great trust in scientific process.”

Embrace the esoterics of electrope engineers and destroy the striking dummy within the time limit!
